emptyState.noUpcomingDescription: Start organizing amazing events and bring people together.
emptyState.noPastDescription: Your past events will appear here.
emptyState.noEventsDescription: Events you create will appear here, sorted by creation date.
emptyState.signInDescription: Start organizing amazing events and bring people together. Sign in to get started.

messages.networkError: Network error: Failed to create event. Please check your connection and try again.
messages.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after start date
messages.createFailed: Failed to create event. Please try again.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Event
deleteConfirm.message: This will permanently delete this event and all associated data including guests, media, and agenda items.

autoPopulate.label: Auto-populate event data
autoPopulate.description: Fill in hosts, agenda & texts from category template

public.title: Tickets
public.empty: No tickets are available for this event yet.
public.mixedCurrencyError: Tickets in your cart use different currencies. Remove one to continue.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.emptyCart: Your cart is empty. Pick a ticket on the event page first.
checkout.promoInvalid: This promo code isn't valid for your cart.

errors.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.submitFailed: We couldn't place your order. Please check your details and try again.

order.loadFailed: Couldn't load this order. Please try again.
order.qrUnavailable: QR unavailable — use the code below at the door.
order.cancelConfirm: Cancel this order? Reserved seats will be released.
order.cancelFailed: Couldn't cancel the order. Please try again.

pending.help: Pay using one of the methods below, then upload a screenshot or PDF receipt to confirm.

awaiting_review.help: We'll email you and update this page when the organizer confirms.

paid.line: You're confirmed. Show your QR code at the door.

refund_requested.line: Your refund request is being reviewed.
refund_requested.help: We'll notify you once the organizer responds.

expired.line: This order expired before payment proof was uploaded.
expired.help: You'll need to start a new order if you still want tickets.

proof.subtitle: Pick a payment method, send the funds, then upload your receipt or screenshot.
proof.noMethods: No payment methods are available for this event yet. Please reach out to the organizer.
proof.noMethodsForTickets: The organizer has set up payment methods, but none are tagged for ticket sales yet. Please reach out to them.
proof.fileHint: PDF, JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP. Max 10 MB.
proof.successMessage: Proof uploaded — we'll review it shortly.

errors.fileType: File must be a PDF or image (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP).
errors.submitFailed: Couldn't upload proof. Please try again.

refund.title: Request a refund
refund.subtitle: Tell us briefly why you'd like a refund. The organizer will review and respond.
refund.reasonRequired: Please share a short reason (at least 5 characters).
refund.errorGeneric: Couldn't submit your refund request. Please try again.

list.title: My Tickets
list.subtitle: Your past and upcoming ticket orders.

empty.title: No tickets yet
empty.description: Once you buy tickets they'll appear here so you can show them at the door.
